Give your agents persistent, structured memory that survives across sessions, users, and time — with one docker compose up. What it does Stores memories extracted from conversations via LLM — typed, versioned, confidence-scored Retrieves context in one call — semantic search + BM25 + rerank, packed into a context string ready for your LLM Memory graph — memories relate to each other (updates, contradicts, supports, derives) Temporal validity — facts have validFrom/validUntil; stale knowledge gets superseded, not lost MCP server — works with Claude Desktop and any MCP host out of the box Framework adapters — Vercel AI SDK, LangChain, LangGraph Quickstart Option 1 — Docker (easiest)
